title: Toolchain Abstraction
requirements:
Decouple QA/regression from Node.js. Enable any language/framework per repo via toolchain config.

1. Extend repos.json schema with toolchain object per-repo:
   - Fields: install, typecheck, lint, lint_fix, format_check, test, integration_test, build
   - Null values mean 'skip this step'
   - Update repos.json.example with toolchain section
   - Add toolchain validation to preflight.sh (warn if commands not found)

2. Create scripts/resolve-toolchain.sh:
   - Args: <project_key> <step> (e.g., SHRED test)
   - Reads repos.json, extracts toolchain command for step
   - If null or missing: output {"skip": true, "reason": "not configured"}
   - If present: output {"skip": false, "command": "npm test"}
   - Exit 0 always (null is valid, means skip)

3. Update QA agent scripts:
   - Update regression-guard.sh: replace hardcoded npx tsc --noEmit, npm test, prettier/eslint with resolve-toolchain.sh calls. Skip any step where resolve-toolchain returns skip: true
   - Update worktree-init.sh: replace hardcoded npm install with resolve-toolchain.sh $PROJECT_KEY install, replace hardcoded tsc baseline check with resolve-toolchain.sh $PROJECT_KEY typecheck

4. Update agent prompts for toolchain awareness:
   - Update agents/qa-agent.md: reference toolchain config instead of hardcoded npm/tsc
   - Update agents/developer-agent.md: note that test commands come from toolchain config
   - Update agents/conflict-resolution-agent.md: regression guard uses toolchain config

5. Update CLAUDE.md:
   - Add toolchain resolution to worktree setup section
   - Update QA pipeline section to reference toolchain config
   - Update script reference table with resolve-toolchain.sh

6. Write tests:
   - Test resolve-toolchain.sh with existing config (expect npm commands)
   - Test resolve-toolchain.sh with null step (expect skip)
   - Test resolve-toolchain.sh with unknown project (expect error)
   - Test regression-guard.sh with toolchain resolution
   - Test regression-guard.sh with all-null toolchain (expect all steps skipped)
acceptance_criteria: repos.json schema supports toolchain object with install, typecheck, lint, lint_fix, format_check, test, integration_test, build fields
Null toolchain values mean skip that step
scripts/resolve-toolchain.sh exists and resolves commands from repos.json
resolve-toolchain.sh outputs JSON with skip and command fields
regression-guard.sh uses resolve-toolchain.sh instead of hardcoded commands
worktree-init.sh uses resolve-toolchain.sh instead of hardcoded commands
Agent prompts (qa-agent.md, developer-agent.md, conflict-resolution-agent.md) reference toolchain config
CLAUDE.md updated with toolchain resolution in worktree setup and QA pipeline
